## What happened?

Describe the bug and what you expected instead.

## Reproduction

```bash
# paste the smallest command sequence that reproduces it
```

## Source type

- [ ] Markdown/text
- [ ] PDF
- [ ] local repo
- [ ] saved HTML
- [ ] browser capture JSON

## Reports

Attach or summarize the relevant non-sensitive report files:

- `intake_report.json`
- `evidence_index.json` summary
- `citation_report_*.json`
- `learning_quality_report_*.json`
- `eval_report.json`

Do not paste cookies, tokens, API keys, browser profiles, private course content, or copyrighted full text.
